en_title: Jennifer English Steps Away From Tides of Annihilation Role Due to Health Concerns
cn_title: Jennifer English因健康原因退出《湮灭之潮》主角配音
subtitle: 转任顾问
opus_summary: Jennifer English因个人健康原因退出《湮灭之潮》女主角Gwendolyn的英文配音，但会继续担任项目顾问。接任演员已确定，将在2026年科隆游戏展试玩版中首次亮相。

paragraphs.en: English actress Jennifer English is stepping away from her role as the protagonist in Eclipse Glow Games’ Tides of Annihilation due to health issues.
paragraphs.cn: 英国演员Jennifer English因健康问题，将不再为Eclipse Glow Games作品《湮灭之潮》的主角配音。

paragraphs.en: The developer announced the news on July 17, 2026, just over a year after the title was first revealed at Sony’s February 2025 State of Play.
paragraphs.cn: 开发商于2026年7月17日公布了这一消息。距离该作在索尼2025年2月的State of Play上首次亮相，刚刚过去一年多。

paragraphs.en: As told in a statement on the game’s official X account, English will no longer voice its main character, Gwendolyn, due to “personal health reasons.” She will, however, continue to support the title in an advisory role.
paragraphs.cn: 游戏官方X账号发布声明称，English因「个人健康原因」不再为主角Gwendolyn配音，但仍会以顾问身份继续支持本作。

paragraphs.en: English informed Eclipse Glow Games that she would not be able to continue in the role in early June.
paragraphs.cn: English在6月初告知Eclipse Glow Games，她无法继续担任这一角色。

paragraphs.en: “While we were, of course, saddened by her decision, we completely understood and respected Jennfier in prioritizing her well-being. We are also deeply grateful for the care and responsibility she showed throughout this process,” the studio wrote.
paragraphs.cn: 工作室写道：「她的决定当然令我们难过，但我们完全理解并尊重Jennifer把自身健康放在首位。我们也由衷感谢她在整个过程中表现出的关怀与责任感。」

paragraphs.en: “During this transition, Jennifer remained incredibly supportive and, together with other members of our voice cast, helped us identify and connect with talented performers who could carry Gwendolyn forward while staying true to the character.”
paragraphs.cn: 「在交接期间，Jennifer始终给予我们极大支持。她与其他配音演员一起，帮助我们物色并联系有才华的演员，让Gwendolyn在忠于角色的前提下继续前行。」

paragraphs.en: Luckily, a new voice for Gwendolyn has been found, with English and other members of the game’s cast recommending this as-yet unannounced actor. Eclipse Glow Games says her recent work in the industry “left a strong impression on both Jennifer and our team—not only for the performance itself, but for the remarkable care and dedication she showed in understanding the character.”
paragraphs.cn: 好消息是，Gwendolyn的新配音演员已经确定。这位尚未公布身份的演员由English和本作其他演员共同推荐。Eclipse Glow Games表示，她最近在业内的工作「给Jennifer和我们的团队留下了深刻印象——不仅因为表演本身，也因为她在理解角色时展现出的非凡用心与投入」。

paragraphs.en: We have some sad news to share, that Jennifer English will be stepping away from her role as the English voice of Gwendolyn, the main protagonist in Tides of Annihilation due to personal health reasons. She will continue to support the project in an advisory role.
paragraphs.cn: 「我们有一则令人遗憾的消息要与大家分享：Jennifer English因个人健康原因，将退出《湮灭之潮》主角Gwendolyn的英文配音工作。她仍会以顾问身份继续支持项目。」

paragraphs.en: Fans will get to hear the new actor for the first time in Tides of Annihilation’s playable demo this August at Gamescom 2026, a performance that she is now recording. Her voice will also be lent to “select official updates” shared on the game’s official channels around that same time.
paragraphs.cn: 粉丝将于今年8月的2026年科隆游戏展上，在《湮灭之潮》试玩版中首次听到新演员的表演；她目前正在录音。同期，游戏官方渠道发布的「部分官方更新」也会采用她的声音。

paragraphs.en: “We'd also like to thank Jennifer for everything she brought to the character and to the project. Her performance brought depth, strength, vulnerability, and heart to the role. We have truly enjoyed this journey together, and wish Jennifer all the very best, and most importantly, good health and happiness in whatever comes next,” the studio wrote.
paragraphs.cn: 工作室写道：「我们也要感谢Jennifer为这个角色和项目带来的一切。她的表演赋予角色深度、力量、脆弱感与灵魂。我们真心享受共同走过的这段旅程，并祝愿Jennifer未来一切顺利；最重要的是，无论下一站是什么，都祝她健康幸福。」

paragraphs.en: Tides of Annihilation is a narrative-driven, single-player action adventure game that combines “intense, breakneck combat, an immersive narrative, and an unforgettable setting.” That setting is a modern-day London plunged into chaos by magical forces inspired by Arthurian legends, which Gwendolyn must defeat with help from "spectral" versions of the Knights of the Round Table.
paragraphs.cn: 《湮灭之潮》是一款叙事驱动的单人动作冒险游戏，融合「激烈迅猛的战斗、沉浸式叙事和令人难忘的舞台」。故事发生在现代伦敦，源自亚瑟王传说的魔法力量令城市陷入混乱；Gwendolyn必须借助圆桌骑士的「幽灵」形态击败这些力量。

paragraphs.en: Eclipse Glow Games, based out of Chengdu, China, has pushed out several trailers for the game ahead of its playable demo at Gamescom 2026, showing off cinematics, boss fights , and even technical behind-the-scenes development footage. Its release date has yet to be revealed, but in the meantime, you can check out our guide for all the games you can expect to see at Gamescom 2026.
paragraphs.cn: 位于中国成都的Eclipse Glow Games在2026年科隆游戏展试玩版亮相前，已发布多支预告片，展示过场动画、Boss战，甚至还有技术开发幕后画面。本作发售日期尚未公布。
